title: Lagnacha Shot
overview: Abhi is forced into an unwanted marriage and escapes on the wedding day. On the same train, Kriti, also a runaway bride, is fleeing her own fate. Strangers brought together by chance and misunderstandings, their journey turns into one of conflict, connection, and self-discovery. As emotions unfold, they must face a question: Does running away truly set you free?
